description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, hip roof and a large, integrated garage on the left side. The front facade features a covered porch supported by square columns, with wide glass doors and windows providing ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof and garage. The right side of the property is bordered by three wooden privacy screens, and the house sits on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a concrete driveway. The rear and left sides of the bungalow are more minimal, with fewer windows and a simple, clean design. The overall structure is compact, functional, and designed for suburban or urban residential settings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, large garage, covered porch, and wide glass windows, set on a green lawn with privacy screens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, covered porch, wide glass doors, and the main entrance.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the wooden privacy screens and side windows, with some interior visible through the windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with minimal windows and the back of the garage.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the solid garage wall and the driveway leading up to the garage entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
